name: Varsity Track & Field
tagline: Sprints, distance, throws, jumps, and the vault — every event, every Tiger.

headCoach.name: Nicholas Steele
headCoach.bio: Director of SLOHS Track & Field and jumps coach. Source: slohs.slcusd.org/athletics/spring-sports and the team's Google Site (sites.google.com/a/slcusd.org/slohs-track-and-field).

assistantCoaches.name: Nancy Steinmaus
assistantCoaches.bio: Also serves as a head cross country coach — nsteinmaus@hotmail.com.

assistantCoaches.name: Dan Berkeland
assistantCoaches.bio: Three-time All-American and 1992 National Champion in the 3000m steeplechase for Cal Poly San Luis Obispo, where he graduated in 1996 with a degree in Architecture. Co-founder of The Back Porch Bakery, which serves wholesale bread to over 200 locations across the Central Coast. Began coaching at SLOHS in 2024 as a girls track distance assistant; later took on the head role for girls cross country.

assistantCoaches.name: Dave Wilson
assistantCoaches.bio: Has been a coach in the San Luis Obispo area for over 30 years. Enjoys helping athletes achieve success not only on the track but in life.

assistantCoaches.name: Charlie Pearson
assistantCoaches.bio: Burlington, Washington native entering his second year at Cal Poly studying Kinesiology. Started pole vaulting his freshman year of high school.
